name: @mokoyee/cc-switch-web
description: Daemon-first web console and local proxy control plane for Codex, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and related AI CLI tools.

scripts.acceptance:all: npm run acceptance:core && npm run acceptance:delivery
scripts.acceptance:core: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:browser
scripts.acceptance:delivery: npm run smoke && npm run release:bundle && npm run release:verify:latest
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/shared && npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/daemon && npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/web && npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/cli
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run smoke:daemon
scripts.dev:daemon: npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/shared && npm run dev --workspace @cc-switch-web/daemon
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/shared && npm run dev --workspace @cc-switch-web/web
scripts.smoke: npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/shared && npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/web && npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/daemon && npm run smoke:daemon
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @cc-switch-web/daemon && npm run test --workspace @cc-switch-web/web
scripts.test:browser: npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/shared && npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/web && npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/daemon && playwright test
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @cc-switch-web/daemon && npm run typecheck --workspace @cc-switch-web/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @cc-switch-web/cli
